SRPBB.Settings.EnableAbility.Name: Break Down Ability Checks
SRPBB.Settings.EnableAbility.Hint: Show the modifier breakdown for ability checks.
SRPBB.Settings.EnableSave.Name: Break Down Saving Throws
SRPBB.Settings.EnableSave.Hint: Show the modifier breakdown for saving throws.
SRPBB.Settings.EnableSkill.Name: Break Down Skill & Tool Checks
SRPBB.Settings.EnableSkill.Hint: Show the modifier breakdown for skill and tool checks.
SRPBB.Settings.EnableAttack.Name: Break Down Attack Rolls
SRPBB.Settings.EnableAttack.Hint: Show the modifier breakdown for attack rolls.
SRPBB.Settings.EnableDamage.Name: Break Down Damage Rolls
SRPBB.Settings.EnableDamage.Hint: Show the damage composition (dice, ability, magic, bonuses).
SRPBB.Settings.Visibility.Name: Breakdown Visibility
SRPBB.Settings.Visibility.Hint: Who is allowed to see the breakdown section on a chat card.
SRPBB.Settings.ShowSources.Name: Identify Active Effect Sources
SRPBB.Settings.ShowSources.Hint: Trace bonus modifiers back to the Active Effects (items, feats, spells) that produced them.
SRPBB.Settings.ShowFormula.Name: Show Roll Formula (Debug)
SRPBB.Settings.ShowFormula.Hint: Display the underlying roll formula at the bottom of each breakdown.
SRPBB.Settings.ShowSourcePaths.Name: Show Data Paths (Debug)
SRPBB.Settings.ShowSourcePaths.Hint: Display the system data path each bonus modifier reads from.
